title: Cilium Endpoint
description: A Cilium-managed network endpoint representing a Kubernetes pod or container with associated security identity, IP addressing, and policy enforcement state.

id.description: Numeric endpoint ID assigned by the Cilium agent.

EndpointSpec.description: Desired configuration for a Cilium endpoint.

containerID.description: Container runtime identifier for this endpoint.

containerName.description: Container name as reported by the container runtime.

k8sNamespace.description: Kubernetes namespace in which the pod runs.

k8sPodName.description: Kubernetes pod name associated with this endpoint.

k8sUID.description: Kubernetes pod UID uniquely identifying the pod object.

labels.description: Security labels associated with this endpoint in key=value format.

AddressPair.description: IPv4 and IPv6 address pair assigned to an endpoint.

ipv4.description: IPv4 address assigned to the endpoint.

ipv4-expiry-time.description: Expiry time for the IPv4 address lease.

ipv6.description: IPv6 address assigned to the endpoint.

ipv6-expiry-time.description: Expiry time for the IPv6 address lease.

DatapathConfiguration.description: BPF datapath-specific configuration for an endpoint.

disable-sip-verification.description: Disable source IP verification for this endpoint.

external-ipam.description: Whether IP addressing is managed by an external IPAM provider.

install-endpoint-route.description: Whether to install a per-endpoint host route.

require-arp-passthrough.description: Whether ARP passthrough is required for this endpoint.

require-egress-prog.description: Whether an egress BPF program is required.

require-routing.description: Whether routing is required for this endpoint.

EndpointStatus.description: Current observed state of a Cilium endpoint.

state.description: Current lifecycle state of the endpoint.

controllers.description: Status of background controllers managing this endpoint.

log.description: Recent status change log entries for this endpoint.

Identity.description: Cilium security identity derived from a workload's label set.

labels.description: Labels that define this security identity.

labelsSHA256.description: SHA256 hash of the serialized label set for change detection.

EndpointNetworking.description: Network addressing and routing information for an endpoint.

addressing.description: IP addresses assigned to this endpoint.

node.description: IP address of the Kubernetes node hosting this endpoint.

interface-index.description: Linux network interface index for this endpoint's veth.

interface-name.description: Linux network interface name for this endpoint's veth device.

EndpointPolicyStatus.description: Policy enforcement status for ingress and egress traffic.

EndpointPolicy.description: The set of policy rules applied to an endpoint.

allowed-egress-identities.description: Numeric identity IDs that egress traffic from this endpoint may reach.

allowed-ingress-identities.description: Numeric identity IDs permitted to send traffic to this endpoint.

denied-egress-identities.description: Numeric identity IDs explicitly denied for egress.

denied-ingress-identities.description: Numeric identity IDs explicitly denied for ingress.

id.description: Policy revision number when these rules were last computed.

cidr.description: CIDR block this rule applies to.

except.description: CIDR blocks to exclude from this rule.

derived-from-rules.description: Policy rule labels from which this CIDR rule was derived.

ProxyStatistics.description: L7 proxy traffic statistics for an endpoint port.

location.description: Location of the proxy (ingress or egress).

protocol.description: Application protocol being proxied (HTTP, Kafka, DNS, etc.).

received.description: Number of requests or responses received.

sent.description: Number of requests or responses sent.

forwarded.description: Number of requests or responses forwarded.

denied.description: Number of requests or responses denied by policy.

error.description: Number of requests or responses that encountered errors.

EndpointHealth.description: Health status of an endpoint's BPF programs and policy.

bpf.description: Health status of BPF programs for this endpoint.

connected.description: Whether the endpoint's network interface is connected.

overallHealth.description: Overall health status of the endpoint.

policy.description: Health status of policy enforcement for this endpoint.

ControllerStatus.description: Status of a background controller managing endpoint reconciliation.

lastFailureTimestamp.description: Timestamp of the most recent failure.

lastSuccessTimestamp.description: Timestamp of the most recent successful run.

uuid.description: Unique identifier for this controller instance.

EndpointStatusChange.description: A single status change entry in the endpoint log.

message.description: Human-readable description of the status change event.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this status change occurred.
